title: Fakemon of fapdos
description: Adds a lot of different fakemon into Cobblemon, all original creations of fapdos
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!


 

Welcome to Fakemon of fapdos!

 

Introduction

This is a Cobblemon addon that adds lots of new Fakemon into the game! Not only does this datapack add them, but it makes all of the already existing Pokémon unable to spawn, thus making the Fakemon added by this project the only ones able to spawn around the world. The point of this datapack is to create a Pokémon world from scratch, from the very beginning, without any of the previously existing Pokémon. Any and all Pokémon that you can find while using this project should be the custom Fakemon added by the datapack.

 

Documentation about the Fakemon added by this project

Here's a Google Doc explaning the main features you should know about the Fakemon added by this project. Please click here to get to the document.

 

How to install

Step 1: Download this datapack.

Step 2: Open your Minecraft resourcepacks folder and put the datapack there.

Step 3: Open the folder of the Minecraft world you want to use this datapack in.

Step 4: Add the datapack into the datapacks folder of the world.

Step 5: Once you have the datapack correctly installed into the world, and you have the resourcepack in use, everything should be good to go!

 

Feel free to ask any question or report any issues to our Discord server!

 

Things you need to have in order to make this datapack work correctly

- Cobblemon
- (Optional) Journeymap

 

Includes Journeymap compatability!

 

This project works for both Forge and Fabric!

 

Yes, you are fully allowed to make fan art of this project and post it online. You are fully allowed to share anything you want about this project to others. I really love it when people share around the things they do with my projects.

 

Battle music by Kunning Fox

 

Sponsored by BisectHosting! Click on this text right here to get there and use code ''fapdos'' for a 25% OFF your next purchase!
